summary: Channel-neutral list of message attachments with name, media type, size, and optional safe link.
useWhen: A conversation message needs to display already-known attachment metadata.
avoidWhen: Users need to choose, upload, remove, or edit files; those controls belong to the product workflow.
accessibility: Attachment name remains visible and is the link text when a safe URL is available.
Media type and size are supporting metadata, never the only identifier.
responsiveBehavior: Long names wrap or truncate without overflowing the message surface.
